title: achnatherum diegoense
intro: Achnatherum diegoense, also known as San Diego bunchgrass, is a species of grass that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Achnatherum diegoense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used topically to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
